response_text:
ENTITY Flight
PK flight_id
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_date : date
ATTR flight_number : varchar
ATTR airline_id : varchar : FK
ATTR departure_airport_id : varchar : FK
ATTR departure_time : time
ATTR arrival_airport_id : varchar : FK
ATTR arrival_time : time
ATTR status : varchar
ATTR scheduled_arrival_date : date

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_id
ATTR airline_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Airport
PK airport_id
ATTR airport_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR location_id : varchar : FK

ENTITY Location
PK location_id
ATTR location_id : varchar : PK
ATTR city : varchar

ENTITY Crew
PK crew_id
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK
ATTR crew_name : varchar
ATTR crew_surname : varchar
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK status_code
ATTR status_code : varchar : PK
ATTR status_description : varchar

ENTITY FlightLeg
PK flight_leg_id
ATTR flight_leg_id : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_id : varchar : FK
ATTR leg_number : integer
ATTR departure_airport_id : varchar : FK
ATTR arrival_airport_id : varchar : FK
ATTR scheduled_departure_time : time
ATTR scheduled_arrival_time : time
ATTR actual_departure_time : time
ATTR actual_arrival_time : time
ATTR aircraft_registration : varchar : FK

ENTITY Aircraft
PK aircraft_registration
ATTR aircraft_registration : varchar : PK
ATTR aircraft_model : varchar

REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1..N : FK=airline_id
REL Flight -> FlightStatus : 1 -> 1 : FK=status
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1..N : FK=departure_airport_id
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1..N : FK=arrival_airport_id
REL Flight -> FlightLeg : 1 -> 1..N : FK=flight_id
REL FlightLeg -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=departure_airport_id
REL FlightLeg -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=arrival_airport_id
REL FlightLeg -> Aircraft : 1 -> 1 : FK=aircraft_registration
REL FlightLeg -> Crew : 1 -> 1..N :
